{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322191535CF109D61D3F1ECC6425E"}"},"total":197},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618242217211216664","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"很好看的一本书，第一个副本是真把我吸引住了，我是一口气看完的，没有发现毒点，(可能有些细微的消毒点，但我没注意到)非常棒的一本书，值得看"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773762860,"group_id":"7604888545349602366","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"本人看了有几年的小说，并不是单此平台，奈何文底不足，大多评论多少有些表达不清本人实意。一本书的各种细节我可能说不清，但是否为好书，是否能看下去，我觉得本人是能说一二三出来的","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/xQOq+X4aNuo0ZTRsAgpwQ=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4b019fd5b2c84339ac2c145bbbce0294~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776706679&x-signature=qPnQ2ARu2zv0hpxJnupbHNQktnQ%3D","user_id":"422670214373260","user_name":"看不到希望"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"422670214373260","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1742091336,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E8EEFF","can_worn":false,"id":9,"name":"守护者","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9bfd769bf7c1205b6bb2f351783fe88c","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/05d4b00798f1b51b8642604fba4b0ac9"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7604888545349602366","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出，后续会涨）【变身】【单身】【腹黑】【戏精】【杀伐果断】【智斗】【推理】
　　神说，戴罪者当受其罚。
　　于是，【天狱】诞生了。
　　被投入天狱的戴罪者只有两个选择：审判别人，或者被别人审判。
　　也既是：杀死别人，或者被别人杀死。
　　在天狱的审判游戏中，逻辑是武器，情绪是破绽，而生存，是一场永无止境的、对自身与他人的审判。
　　谁，能一直活到最后？
　　……
　　那一天，天狱里来了一个手无缚鸡之力的“弱女子”。
　　呃……至少她自己是这么说的。
　　她还说自己其实只想活着，无意害人性命。
　　但实际上……
　　“她就是一个杀人不眨眼的魔头！跟她一起玩过游戏的，就没有一个活着回来的！”
　　“不，不！她不是魔头，她是神，是杀不死的神！99次了，为什么我无论如何也杀不死她！？”
　　“你还说你只想活着，不想成神？那你现在把刀架在神的脖子上是怎么回事！？”
　　“嘻嘻，成了神，我就可以一直活到永远了呀～”
　　“……”
　　本书又名：
　　《杀死那个弱女子！》
　　《我本无意登神》
　　《嘻嘻，我一定要活下去口牙！》","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/60146ab9694b56d5bc1abf0a5ff6cf22","author":"潮汐nn","author_id":"","book_id":"7604888545349602366","book_name":"死亡游戏：从变身少女开始登神","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#300808","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"5.5万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7606042531091972670","read_count":"54674","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"202452"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.6","serial_count":"84","tags":"悬疑脑洞,悬疑,腹黑,推理,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/e65b2acca1063b4e62523423767c5171~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362135&x-signature=fUaW8E7SJGWsYZiROOvxrpX%2Bsco%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3131004596793240","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"73"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322191535CF109D61D3F1ECC6425E"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":10033,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":703},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7614781465204638489","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"前文的文笔其实不是很好，看着有点怪，大家可以选择性跳过吧。但是后面的游戏过程很好看，通俗易懂，不会有太多看不懂高大上的词和乱七八糟的技能。技能太多的文我看着头晕。目前第一个游戏大家都是没有技能的人，纯拼脑力和嘴。也能让读者可以跟着一起看懂，不会让人懵懵的，所以说这是一个很好的小说，看的很舒服。我翻了翻评论看得出作者也是有用心写的，支持一下，五星好评。
反正就很舒服，所以是一篇舒服文"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772956531,"group_id":"7604888545349602366","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"活跃的网友🥴","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7KOBcAfWdSM7KxKGsuFGNk=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bd8f0e577061441a8f3765d2bd69c4cd~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776702877&x-signature=0bdZi6K0hrJQJ%2B43xSNvPrKSdq0%3D","user_id":"822892814412125","user_name":"正义的路人甲大王"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"822892814412125","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7604888545349602366","book_info":{"abstract":"（评分刚出，后续会涨）【变身】【单身】【腹黑】【戏精】【杀伐果断】【智斗】【推理】
